articles.title: What is Polkadot? The Complete Guide
articles.description: Polkadot has been receiving a great deal of attention for its innovative parachain approach. Here is everything you need to know about the cross-chain blockchain.

articles.title: DAO Maker Suffers $7 Million Exploit
articles.description: DAO Maker, a popular decentralized finance platform, recently experienced a security breach that led to the loss of $7 million. The exploit has raised concerns about vulnerabilities in DeFi protocols and prompted investigations into the incident. The platform is working on measures to enhance security and protect user assets in the future.

articles.title: Ripple’s XRP Surges 14% As Other Major Cryptocurrencies Cool Off From Yesterday’s Rally
articles.description: The market is taking a breather from yesterday's rally, which saw the global cryptocurrency market capitalization cross the $2 trillion threshold for the first time in nearly three months.

articles.title: Uniswap Becomes First DeFi Protocol to Generate $1B in Fees
articles.description: The Uniswap decentralized exchange (DEX) has hit a milestone in terms of fee generation, becoming the first DeFi protocol to reach $1 billion.

articles.title: Chilean Peso stablecoin goes live on Stellar Network
articles.description: Chilean Peso-pegged stablecoin CLPX launched on Stellar this week and is hoping to gain traction in the remittance and copper markets.
